name: UAE — 137 missiles, 209 drones
detail: 3 killed, 58+ injured. Burj Al Arab fire, Jebel Ali Port fire, Dubai Airport drone hit.

name: Israel — Multiple barrages
detail: 9+ killed near Beit Shemesh (synagogue), 777 hospitalized. Tel Nof and HaKirya targeted.

name: Qatar — 65 missiles, 12 drones
detail: Al Udeid Air Base targeted. Qatar shot down 2 Su-24s, 7 missiles, 5 drones. 16 injured.

name: Kuwait — Camp Buehring drone strike
detail: 4 US service members killed, 5 seriously wounded. Ali Al Salem attacked.

name: Iraq/Erbil — 70+ missiles and drones
detail: Erbil Airport and US Consulate targeted. Fire at air base.

name: Bahrain — 5th Fleet HQ targeted
detail: Shahed drone struck apartment near HQ. Airport hit. 4 injured.

name: USS Abraham Lincoln — IRGC claims hit
detail: CENTCOM categorically denies: "Not hit. Not even close." Lincoln continues ops.

name: Lebanon — Hezbollah enters conflict
detail: 6 projectiles at Israeli base near Haifa. Israel strikes Beirut; 52 killed, 154 wounded in Lebanon.

name: Yemen — Houthi Red Sea escalation
detail: Houthis fire 3 anti-ship missiles at US destroyer. USS Gravely intercepts all. Houthis declare blockade of Red Sea.

name: Iraq — Militia rocket barrage at Al Asad
detail: Iran-backed PMF fires 40+ rockets at Al Asad Airbase. 2 US contractors killed, 11 wounded. Base partially evacuated.

name: UAE — Second drone wave
detail: 48 Shahed drones target Dubai International Airport. 31 intercepted. 3 hit terminal. Airport closed 18 hours.

name: Israel — Haifa port missile strike
detail: Hezbollah fires anti-ship missiles at Haifa port. One cargo vessel hit. 3 dock workers killed.

name: Iranian Missile Barrage — Israel and U.S. Bases
detail: Iran launched multiple missiles targeting Israel and U.S. bases; interceptions reported.

name: Hezbollah Strikes
detail: Hezbollah launched projectiles into northern Israel; Israeli airstrikes in Beirut followed.

name: Iranian Strikes — Bahrain
detail: Iran targeted U.S. Fifth Fleet HQ; one civilian killed, two injured.

name: Iranian Strikes — Oman
detail: Ports of Duqm and Salalah targeted; one foreign worker injured.

name: Iranian Strikes — Gulf States
detail: Missiles and drones launched at UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, and Saudi Arabia; casualties reported.

name: Iranian Strikes — Iraq
detail: Missiles targeted Erbil Airport and U.S. Consulate; fire at air base.

name: Iranian Strikes — Jordan
detail: Iran launched missiles and drones into Jordanian airspace; several civilians injured by falling shrapnel.

name: Iranian Strikes — Oil Tankers off Oman
detail: Two tankers targeted; one crew member killed, four injured.

name: Iranian Strikes — UK Base in Cyprus
detail: Drone struck runway; no casualties reported.

name: Iranian Missile Barrage — Israel and U.S. Bases
detail: Iran launched multiple missiles targeting Israel and U.S. military bases; interceptions reported.

name: Iranian Missile and Drone Attacks
detail: Iran launched missile and drone attacks on U.S. military-hosting nations including Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and Bahrain.

name: Iranian Strikes on Israel
detail: Iran launched multiple waves of missile and drone attacks against Israel, with some hitting civilian areas.

name: Hezbollah Missile Attacks
detail: Hezbollah launched missile attacks on Israeli tanks near the southern Lebanese border.

name: Iranian Strikes on Bahrain
detail: Iran conducted missile and drone strikes on Bahrain, hitting multiple buildings and a U.S. fleet headquarters.

name: Iranian Strikes on Qatar
detail: Iran launched missile strikes on Qatar, with some missiles intercepted and two Iranian Su-24 bombers shot down.

name: Iranian Strikes — Qatar
detail: Iran launched missile strikes on Qatar, with some missiles intercepted and two Iranian Su-24 bombers shot down.

name: Iranian Missile Barrage — Israel
detail: Iran launched multiple missiles targeting Israel; interceptions reported.

name: Iranian Drone Strikes — Gulf States
detail: Iran intensified drone and missile attacks on Bahrain, causing massive damage to a refinery.

name: Hezbollah Missile Attacks — Israel
detail: Hezbollah launched multiple missiles from Lebanon into Israel; Israeli airstrikes followed.

name: Iranian UAV Attack — Azerbaijan
detail: Three Iranian UAVs targeted the passenger terminal of Nakhchivan International Airport.

name: Iranian Missile Strikes
detail: Iran launched missiles targeting military sites in Tel Aviv, Beersheba, and Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan.

name: Kuwait City Drone Strike
detail: An Iranian drone strike set a Kuwait City tower belonging to the Public Institution for Social Security ablaze.

name: Bahrain Desalination Plant
detail: An Iranian drone damaged a desalination plant in Bahrain, injuring three people and damaging a university building.

name: Iran Drone Attack — Haifa Oil Refinery, Israel
detail: The Iranian army launched a drone attack targeting an Israeli oil and gas refinery and fuel tanks in Haifa. Israeli air defenses were activated; intercept efforts underway. First confirmed targeting of Israeli energy infrastructure in Haifa.

name: Iran Lays Mines — Strait of Hormuz
detail: Iran began laying naval mines in the Strait of Hormuz, through which 20% of world oil transits. US intelligence confirmed the operation. Trump issued ultimatum for immediate removal threatening 'death, fire and fury.' CENTCOM subsequently destroyed 16 mine-laying vessels. The IRGC said Iran will not allow 'a single liter of oil' from the region to the 'hostile side and its partners until further notice.'

name: IRGC — 6 Vessels Struck in Persian Gulf (48 hrs)
detail: Iran struck 6 commercial and tanker vessels in the Persian Gulf over March 11-12: 3 on Mar 11, 3 more on Mar 12 including a US-owned tanker near Iraq's southern ports (first such strike in Iraqi waters). Container ship off UAE coast struck early Mar 12. Oman fuel storage tanks hit by Iranian drone. Bahrain fuel tanks targeted. ~500 oil tankers stranded in Persian Gulf per tracking data. Only 5 tankers departed the area in 24 hours.

name: Hezbollah — Largest Rocket Attack Since War Began
detail: Hezbollah launched its biggest rocket barrage against Israel since the conflict began on March 12 — part of a IRGC+Hezbollah joint operation striking 50+ Israeli targets over 5 hours. Israeli military said Hezbollah fired heavy volleys toward northern Israel overnight, repeatedly driving residents into shelters. Israel responded with attacks on Hezbollah launch sites and command infrastructure. Israeli DM Katz warned: 'If Lebanon cannot control Hezbollah, we will take the territory.'

name: Israeli Strike Kills 4 Iranian Diplomats in Beirut
detail: An Israeli airstrike in Beirut killed four Iranian diplomats. Iran condemned the strike as a 'terrorist attack' and demanded justice at the UN Security Council.

name: Iran — Most Intense Missile Barrage (Palmachim, Ovda, Shin Bet HQ)
detail: IRGC launched its 'most intense operation since beginning of war,' targeting Palmachim Airbase south of Tel Aviv, Ovda Airbase (Negev), and Shin Bet HQ in central Israel with advanced ballistic missiles. 58 Israelis hospitalized. Blasts heard over Jerusalem.

name: Iran Underwater Drones — Safesea Vishnu + Zefyros (Iraqi Waters, Basra)
detail: Iran used underwater suicide drones to strike US-owned MV Safesea Vishnu and MV Zefyros in Iraqi territorial waters near Basra. 1 Indian crew killed, 25 rescued. First oil-related attack in Iraqi waters. Iraq suspended oil terminal operations.

name: Iran Drone — French Base, Mala Qara, Iraqi Kurdistan
detail: Iranian drone strike on joint French-Peshmerga base at Mala Qara (Makhmour, ~40km from Erbil). 1 French soldier killed (CWO Arnaud Frion, 7th Chasseurs Alpins), 5 injured. First French combat death of the war. Italy also withdraws troops after separate Erbil base strike.

name: Kuwait International Airport — Drone Attack
detail: Iranian drones targeted Kuwait International Airport, causing material damage. 6 electricity transmission lines disrupted by debris from intercepted drones. Earlier residential building in Kuwait City struck, wounding 2.

name: UAE — 9 Ballistic Missiles + 33 UAVs (All Intercepted)
detail: IRGC launched 9 ballistic missiles and 33 UAVs at UAE targets on March 14. UAE air defense intercepted all — Patriot and THAAD batteries performed without a miss. No casualties or infrastructure damage reported per UAE Ministry of Defense.

name: Saudi Arabia — 7 Iranian Drones Intercepted Over Riyadh
detail: Iran launched 7 Shahed-type drones toward Riyadh; Saudi Civil Defense intercepted all 7 before reaching the capital. No casualties. Marks continued IRGC pressure on Saudi Arabia despite Pezeshkian's Mar 7 pledge to stop Gulf strikes.

name: Qatar — 4 Ballistic Missiles Intercepted
detail: IRGC fired 4 ballistic missiles toward Qatar, targeting the Al Udeid Air Base area — the largest US air base in the Middle East. Qatar air defenses intercepted all 4. No US casualties reported.

name: Baghdad — US Embassy Helipad + Air Defense System Destroyed
detail: Missile (attributed to Islamic Resistance in Iraq / IRGC proxy) struck US Embassy Baghdad compound, destroying the helipad and Centurion CIWS air defense installation. First direct strike on the Embassy compound. No US fatalities. CENTCOM initiated investigation.

name: Iran 6th Wave — Tel Nof AB, Israeli Military HQ, Tel Aviv Defense Industry
detail: IRGC Aerospace Force announced its 'sixth wave' of retaliatory operations. Targets included Tel Nof Airbase (IAF F-35I home, south of Tel Aviv), the Israeli Military General Headquarters (Kirya, Tel Aviv), and a defense industry complex in central Israel. Sirens blared across central and northern Israel. Cluster missile fragments struck Tel Aviv streets. Iron Dome, David's Sling, and Arrow-3 systems all activated. 58 Israelis taken to hospitals. Total 174+ attack waves conducted against Israel since Feb 28.
